purpose: Retain a selected-pair Copernicus GLO-30 DEM cell sample with tile, cell, CRS, datum, and license traceability. This artifact is evidence that a stronger DEM source path exists; it does not replace the current station registry or elevation cache values.

samplingTool.rawDemPolicy: Raw GeoTIFF tiles were read by HTTPS range requests and were not committed to the repository.
samplingTool.samplingMethod: nearest-cell sample computed from GeoTIFF origin and pixel resolution, then read with a 1x1 raster window

dataset.distribution: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs in the AWS Open Data copernicus-dem-30m bucket
dataset.distributionRelease: Copernicus DEM 2021 release per AWS Open Data registry
dataset.verticalDatum: EGM2008 / EPSG:3855 per Copernicus Data Space DGED specification
dataset.rasterType: RasterPixelIsPoint for DGED according to Copernicus Data Space; GeoTIFF key observed as GTRasterTypeGeoKey=2
dataset.licenseStatus: GLO-30 Public and GLO-90 are available on a free basis for the general public under the Copernicus DEM license terms
dataset.citation: Copernicus Digital Elevation Model (DEM) accessed on 2026-06-12 from https://registry.opendata.aws/copernicus-dem/ and the copernicus-dem-30m S3 bucket.
dataset.requiredNoticeSummary: When communicating or distributing Copernicus WorldDEM-30 data, use the source notice requested by Copernicus Data Space. This artifact records sampled values only and does not redistribute raw tiles.

stationCoordinate.authorityBoundary: Representative Yangmingshan-region coordinate; not proven as an official facility coordinate.

sample.currentProjectSource: legacy Open-Elevation service cache, reproduced in open-elevation-selected-pair-query-2026-06-12.json

samples.presentationBoundary: Use this as a stronger DEM comparison source for the representative coordinate, not as an adopted registry value until the coordinate authority and replacement policy are reviewed.

stationCoordinate.authorityBoundary: Operator-web coordinate, compatible with SANSA's published 25 deg 53 South, 27 deg 42 East site disclosure.

sample.currentProjectSource: SANSA operator page altitude after source reconciliation

samples.presentationBoundary: Use operator-stated 1553 m for facility altitude claims. Use this DEM sample only as a terrain/DSM comparison cell unless a DEM replacement policy is accepted.

supports: selected-pair DEM cell row/column and center-coordinate traceability
selected-pair DEM comparison values with CRS, datum, and license source references
evidence that the current Open-Elevation cache values are not identical to Copernicus GLO-30 samples
doesNotSupport: packet, RF, route, or acceptance claims
